title: iberis contracta
intro: Iberis contracta, also known as rock candy or rock rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the cress family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been valued for its health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Iberis contracta typically involve infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
